# format: html5-dom-v2

#dom-snapshot-v2
#document
  <!doctype html>
  element ns=html local="html" attrs=[]
    element ns=html local="head" attrs=[]
      element ns=html local="title" attrs=[]
        "Site"
    element ns=html local="body" attrs=[]
      "\n"
      element ns=html local="nav" attrs=[]
        element ns=html local="ul" attrs=[]
          element ns=html local="li" attrs=[]
            element ns=html local="a" attrs=[{ns=none prefix=- local="href" value="/"}]
              "Home"
          element ns=html local="li" attrs=[]
            element ns=html local="a" attrs=[{ns=none prefix=- local="href" value="/about"}]
              "About"
          element ns=html local="li" attrs=[]
            element ns=html local="a" attrs=[{ns=none prefix=- local="href" value="/contact"}]
              "Contact"
      "\n"
      element ns=html local="main" attrs=[]
        element ns=html local="p" attrs=[]
          "Simple company page."
      "\n"
      element ns=html local="footer" attrs=[]
        element ns=html local="a" attrs=[{ns=none prefix=- local="href" value="/privacy"}]
          "Privacy"
        element ns=html local="a" attrs=[{ns=none prefix=- local="href" value="/terms"}]
          "Terms"
      "\n"
